PFR Home Page > Frivolities > NFL Octopus Tracker, 8-Point Scorers

Keyboard Shortcuts

/ to toggle search input

More about this update

A complete list of all NFL players to score both the touchdown and the subsequent two-point conversions during a single possession. This list begins in 1994 when the NFL introduced the two-point conversion. The AFL did have two-point conversions from 1960-1969, but we do not have complete records for all of those.

This stat was created by Mitch Goldich in a column from March of 2019. If you want to be updated live as octopuses (octopi?) happen each Sunday, follow the NFL Octopus Tracker on Twitter.

Octopus Touchdown and Two Point Conversion Scorers

Octopus Touchdown and Two Point Conversion Scorers Table
